name: Ranger
description: A wilderness hunter who strikes from range and reads the land. Rangers track quarry across rooms and land a powerful aimed shot, later training second wind to keep going on long hunts and, at level 15, a crippling shot that hobbles a foe's aim and attacks, then at level 30 a volley that rains arrows on every enemy in the room at once, and at level 45 a hunter's mark that brands a foe and lays their defences bare for the whole party; the fastest class afoot, the ranger trades a rogue's burst and toughness for unmatched mobility and reach.
